snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #587 - Ratko i Zdravko MamiДҮ 1.dio
snippet.description:
Prvi puta izaЕЎli smo iz studija, prvi puta snimamo van Hrvatske, prvi puta smo prekoraДҚili 5 i pol sati trajanja. I sve to na Uskrs i sve to u MeД‘ugorju, sve pred povijesni ДҚetvrtfinalni okrЕЎaj Dinama s Villarrealom - gost je tko drugi nego Zdravko MamiДҮ! U kakvim je trenutno odnosima s ModriДҮem, Е ukerom i Bjelicom, javljaju li mu se uopДҮe bivЕЎi igraДҚi, kako su izgledali pregovori s Danielom Levyjem i Florentinom Perezom, ЕЎto kaЕҫe za sluДҚaj Majana DabiДҮa, odnos s BBB-ima i medijima u zadnjih 15 godina, je li ovo sa sucima tek poДҚetak? Sve to i puno viЕЎe doznajte u nedjelju od 20 sati samo u Podcast Inkubatoru!

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u srediЕЎnjoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo viЕЎe od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a sliДҚan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima moЕҫe izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuДҮu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogoД‘ena podruДҚja, a viЕЎe saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica

As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom.

No money no, no business

and keep the distance

we have to dance

Svetom vlada ДҚudna epidemija

Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,

Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako

Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...

We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars

Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima

Ludilo preti planeti,

Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini

PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.

Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani

Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.

Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piЕЎe LOCK DOWN,
VidiЕЎ na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ДҚini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ДҚekamo
Da me grliЕЎ hoДҮu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluЕЎaj malo doktore na vestima
Е ta ДҮe dalje biti baЕЎ me zanima
ДҢekaj, hani, hani, da proД‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoЕЎ samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reДҚ
PuniДҚemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeДҚ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Дҗole Дҗogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ЕЎto smo sami,
Ne moЕҫemo vani
Zato doД‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaЕЎ mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranЕҫman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicвҖӢвҖӢ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: NEDJELJOM U 2: Juraj Е ebalj, 4. travnja 2021.

snippet.title: РҹСҖРёРҝСҖРөРјР° Р·Р° РјР°СӮСғСҖСғ Сғ Р”РёР°РҪРёРҪРҫСҳ СҲРәРҫР»Рё | РҡРҫ СҒРө Р·Р°СҷСғРұРёРҫ Сғ РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲР°?
snippet.description:
РЎРІРё СҒРө Сғ СҲРәРҫР»Рё СҒРҝСҖРөРјР°СҳСғ Р·Р° РјР°СӮСғСҖСҒРәРҫ РІРөСҮРө Рё СӮСҖР°Р¶Рө РҝР°СҖСӮРҪРөСҖР°. РқРөРәРё СҒСғ РІРөСӣ РҝСҖРҫРҪР°СҲР»Рё, Р° РҪРөРәРё РҪРёСҒСғ.  РқР°СҒСӮРёР° СҳРө РҪРөРҫСҮРөРәРёРІР°РҪРҫ РҙРҫСҲР»Р° Сғ СҲРәРҫР»Сғ Рё Р¶РөР»Рё РҙР° РёРҙРө РҪР° РјР°СӮСғСҖСҒРәСғ РІРөСҮРөСҖ СҒР° РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲРөРј! РЁСӮР° СӣРө Р”РёР°РҪР° СғСҮРёРҪРёСӮРё? РҡРҫ СӣРө РәРҫСҲР°СҖРәР°СҲ РёРҙРө РҪР° РјР°СӮСғСҖСҒРәРҫ СҒР°? РҹРҫРіР»РөРҙР°СҳСӮРө Сғ РҫРІРҫСҳ СҒРөСҖРёСҳРё!
РҲРҫСҲ СҳРөРҙР°РҪ РІРёРҙРөРҫ: https://youtu.be/KOjiqPP0yLM
РҹСҖРөСӮРҝР»Р°СӮРёСӮРө СҒРө РҪР° РәР°РҪР°Р»!рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘ҰвҖҚрҹ‘Ұ 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
РқРө Р·Р°РұРҫСҖР°РІРёСӮРө РҪР° Р·РІРҫРҪРҫ!рҹ””рҹ””рҹ””
РҘРІР°Р»Р° РҪР° РІР°СҲРёРј СҒРІРёС’Р°СҡРёРјР°!вқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸвқӨпёҸ

localized.description:

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviДҮ iz Golubinje kod ЕҪepДҚa poznat je po tome ЕЎto je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiДҚku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. MeД‘utim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuДҮe, zemljiЕЎta,  ЕЎume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuДҮe i imanja. Danas sadi voДҮe, uzgaja ovce, kokoЕЎi. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloЕҫen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priДҚu koja vas moЕҫe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviДҮ from Golubinja near ЕҪepДҚe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEЕ KE PREДҗU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeЕЎka Еҫivotna priДҚa devojДҚice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala вҖһ300 ДҚudaвҖң donela je zanimljive priДҚe o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaЕҫu uzalud da je pas najbolji ДҚovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moЕҫe da se meri ni sa ДҚim.  U KurЕЎumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreДҮe peЕЎke put ЕЎkole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

#Еҫivotna priДҚa #kurir #kurirTelevizija

Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

#Еҫivotna priДҚa #kurir #kurirTelevizija

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmGвҖӢ
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuoвҖӢ
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLRвҖӢ
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рҹҳӮ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:

snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: prince charles talks about his father

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there

500 ml vode

PaИҷtele se apropie, aИҷa cДғ iatДғ primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouДғlor. VopsiИӣi ouДғle Г®n modul original, fДғrДғ a folosi substanИӣe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul sДғ obИӣinДғ acest efect, cel mai bine este sДғ folosiИӣi albul, aИҷa cДғ la Г®nceputul videoclipului puteИӣi vedea cum sДғ albiИӣi un ou galben obiИҷnuit.

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңIвҖҷve had a lot of lives вҖ“ like my cat, IвҖҷm on my ninth life.вҖқ 
Demi LovatoвҖҷs explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

id.title: Kelahiran Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
вҖңAku mempunyai banyak nyawa вҖ“ seperti kucingku, aku dalam nyawa kesembilanku sekarang.вҖқ
Serial dokumenter eksplosif dari Demi Lovato hamper sampai kepada titik akhir dengan pengungkapan tentang pertunangannya yang kandas, kembalinya ke studio, dan eksplorasi dari kewarasan moderasi ketika dia mencoba untuk melepaskan masa lalunya dan melangkah maju menjalani hidup dengan penuh keceriaan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan) www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Cinta Adalah Respek. Cinta itu lebih besar dari sekadar caramu merasakan. Ketik loveis kirim ke 22522 untuk dukungan dan bantuan memahami hubungan yang sehat.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Ketik: loveis kirim ke 22522
Obrolan Daring: www.loveisrespect.org

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

Temukan sumber-sumber sebagai jalanmu untuk pemulihan di Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

de.title: Wiedergeburt : Dancing with the Devil

Demi Lovatos explosive Dokuserie endet mit EnthГјllungen Гјber ihre gelГ¶ste Verlobung, ihre RГјckkehr ins Studio und das Konzept des maГҹvollen Konsums, wГӨhrend sie versucht, ihre Vergangenheit ruhen zu lassen und ihre Wahrheit zu leben.

fr.title: Renaissance : Dancing with the Devil

Le documentaire explosif de Demi Lovato touche Г  sa fin avec des rГ©vГ©lations sur ses fianГ§ailles rompues, son retour en studio et l'expГ©rimentation d'une thГ©rapie de la modГ©ration tandis qu'elle tente de tourner la page sur son passГ© et de vivre sa vГ©ritГ©.

La explosiva serie documental de Demi Lovato llega a su fin con revelaciones sobre su compromiso cancelado, su regreso al estudio y la exploraciГіn de la sobriedad moderada mientras intenta dejar atrГЎs su pasado y avanzar viviendo su verdad.

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

localized.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
localized.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

snippet.description:

- 200 doubloona
- Dva broda: St. Louis i Premijum brod Emden
- 20x Restless Fire Camouflage
- 2,5 miliona kredita
- 7 dana Premijuma

Albanska golgota, jedan od najdramatiДҚnijih momenata srpske istorije. Prvi svetski rat traje veДҮ godinu i po dana, a kraja nigde na vidiku.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вҖ“ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вҖ“ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвҖӢ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вҖӢ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вҖӢ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вҖқ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вҖҷs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвҖҷve never seen them before.  ItвҖҷs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвҖҷs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вҖңKingвҖқ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вҖңAvengersвҖқ films, вҖңHotel RwandaвҖқ), Khris Davis (вҖңJudas and the Black Messiah,вҖқ TVвҖҷs вҖңAtlantaвҖқ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвҖҷs вҖңThe Walking Dead,вҖқ вҖңStar Trek: DiscoveryвҖқ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), Eric Bauza (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), and Zendaya (upcoming вҖңDune,вҖқ вҖңMalcolm & MarieвҖқ).

Lee (вҖңGirls Trip,вҖқ вҖңNight SchoolвҖқ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвҖҷs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вҖңSpider-Man: HomecomingвҖқ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вҖңWonder ParkвҖқ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вҖңThe MuleвҖқ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвҖҷs вҖңWhen They See UsвҖқ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вҖңEternalsвҖқ), editor Bob Ducsay (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңStar Wars Episode VIII вҖ“ The Last JediвҖқ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вҖңRampage,вҖқ вҖңWar for the Planet of the ApesвҖқ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вҖңGreenbook,вҖқ NetflixвҖҷs вҖңBridgertonвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вҖқ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Ofarbajte jaja u belom vinu -Svetlucava jaja - Farbanje jaja
snippet.description:
Poslednje dve godine sve viЕЎe vidjam jaja farbana u vinu po druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama pa sam reЕЎila da i  kod mene zasvetluca.рҹҷӮ Uz dodatak prehrambene boje za kolaДҚe ili praЕЎkaste farbe dobiДҮete razliДҚite boje a uz dodatak ЕЎeДҮera dodatnu blistavost. 
в—Ҹ SASTOJCI в—Ҹ
Za jednu boju vam treba
500 ml belog vina
100 gr ЕЎeДҮera
prehrambena farba za kolaДҚe
ili praЕЎkasta farba za jaja
Е to se tiДҚe ukusa, jaja se ne oseДҮaju na vino, nisu slatka veДҮ imaju sasvim normalan ukus kao ЕЎto jaja treba da imaju. Naravno, ukoliko vam se jaje razbije u toku kuvanja normalno je da ДҮe povuДҮi ukus.
#farbanjejaja

snippet.title: Emanet 155. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 155 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs SLAVEN BELUPO 2:2 (21.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U zaostalom dvoboju 21. kola HT Prve lige Hajduk i Slaven Belupo su odigrali 2:2, a gosti su tri boda iz ЕЎaka ispustili u 96. minuti.

Od starta su se gosti iz Koprivnice postavili ofenzivno, no Hajduk je prvi zabio. U 22. minuti lijepu su akciju izveli Livaja i Umut Nayir, a turski nogometaЕЎ je zabio za 1:0.

KljuДҚni trenutak ogleda dogodio se krajem prvog dijela kada je zbog nesportskog ponaЕЎanja domaДҮi igraДҚ MujakiДҮ zaradio crveni karton, a potom je u nastavku uslijedio preokret.

Sjajan je bio Ivan KrstanoviДҮ koji je u 65. minuti izjednaДҚio, dok je u 69. zabio fantastiДҚan pogodak sjajnim udarcem s viЕЎe od 20 metara. S igraДҚem manje Hajduk do kraja nije uspio stvoriti pravi pritisak, ali je ipak izjednaДҚio u 96. minuti. Bio je to novi odliДҚan potez Livaje, nova asistencija za Umuta Nayira koji je izjednaДҚio na 2:2.

Slaven Belupo je bio milimetrima blizu pobjede, ali je ipak upisao desetu prvenstvenu utakmicu u nizu bez slavlja (ЕЎest remija i ДҚetiri poraza). Hajduk je ostao dva boda iza Rijeke, ali ima i utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, zaostala utakmica 21. kola: Hajduk - Slaven Belupo 2:2 (Umut Nayir 22., 90.+6/KrstanoviДҮ 65., 69.)

snippet.title: KardeЕҹlerim 8. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
8. BГ¶lГјm Г–zeti: 
 вҖңKalp en Г§ok tutunduДҹu dala kДұrДұlДұr!вҖқ
KenanвҖҷДұn Г¶lГјmГј tГјm dengeleri deДҹiЕҹtirirken Suzan, Akif, Nebahat cephesinde sular durulmaz. ГҮocuklar yaЕҹadДұДҹДұ felaketten sonra yaЕҹamlarДұnДұ dГјzene sokmak iГ§in var gГјcГјyle Г§alДұЕҹДұrken, OrhanвҖҷДұn sunduДҹu teklif KadirвҖҷle Г–merвҖҷi umutlandДұrДұr. KadirвҖҷin SГјsenвҖҷle olan arkadaЕҹlДұДҹДұnДұn iГ§ yГјzГјnГј Г¶Дҹrenen Melisa, KadirвҖҷle yГјzleЕҹmek ister.  ЕһengГјlвҖҷГјn NebahatвҖҷten alacaДҹДұ paranДұn hayaliyle girdiДҹi borГ§lar, OrhanвҖҷla arasДұnДұn aГ§ДұlmasДұna sebep olur. BerkвҖҷin AybikeвҖҷyi zora sokan planДұ ise beklenmedik olaylara yol aГ§ar.

KardeЕҹlerim kanalДұna abone olmak iГ§in; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

Tek dertleri hayat mГјcadelesi olan dГ¶rt kardeЕҹin iГ§ burkan, sevgi dolu hikГўyesiвҖҰ 

BaЕҹrollerini Celil NalГ§akan, Halit Г–zgГјr SarДұ, CГјneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu YaДҹtu ve Simge SelГ§ukвҖҷun paylaЕҹtДұДҹДұ KardeЕҹlerim, herkese ve her Еҹeye raДҹmen kopmayan, dГјЕҹtГјkГ§e birbirine tutunup yeniden ayaДҹa kalkan genГ§lerin umut dolu Г¶ykГјsГјnГј ekrana getiriyor.

atv resmi YouTube kanalДұna abone olmak iГ§in; https://bit.ly/2Pddn3r

snippet.title: Emanet 154. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 154
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#GerГ§ekler

========= The Royal Guard LYRICS =========

From the frozen north they came
Fought for founding fatherвҖҷs claim
It was then, their tale, began

Trace their roots from 16 strong
By the king where they belong

En tid
Av Krig

Wherever he goes, near or far, they are close
For the King of Sweden they lay down their lives

For the Swedish crown they stand
By the king, at his command
500 years for the fatherland
Marching across the belt
Crushing blow at Narva dealt
Livgardet our Royal Guard

Sworn protectors of the throne
Royal doctrine set in stone
For the crown, you shall give your life

By traditions from the past
Swedish soldiers stand steadfast

I frid
Och i strid

And if one should fall, yet another, heeds the call
For king and for country they lay down their lives

FГ¶r Sverige i tiden
Dit konungen gГҘr
De gГ¶r vad som synes omГ¶jligt, vad ГӨn framtiden spГҘr

Still for the crown they stand
By the king, at his command
500 years for the fatherland
Marching across the belt
Crushing blow at Narva dealt
Livgardet our Royal Guard

==================================
Recorded and mixed at Black Lounge studios by Jonas Kjellgren.

snippet.title: Najjednostavniji kolaДҚ na svetu a tako je dobar - Postan recept mera na ДҚaЕЎe
snippet.description:
Najjednostavniji kolaДҚ  na svetu koji svako moЕҫe da napravi jer je prejednostavan a ukus je boЕҫanstven. NaЕҫalost ne mogu da vam doДҚaram koliko je lepo mirisala kuhinja dok se pekao, jer je dovoljno samo da osetite miris i sve ДҮe vam biti jasno koliko je dobar i ukusan ovaj kolaДҚ. InaДҚe ovu pitu odnosno kolaДҚ moЕҫete praviti kao posnu ili mrsnu varijantu a razlika je jedino u tome da li ДҮete koristiti puter ili  margarin. Osim ЕЎto nije skup, ovaj najjednostavniji kolaДҚ na svetu ДҮe vas oДҚarati svojom jednostavnoЕЎДҮu i ukusom.

в—Ҹ SASTOJCI в—Ҹ
2 ДҚaЕЎe mekog braЕЎna Sentella tip 400
2 ДҚaЕЎe griza
1 ДҚaЕЎa ЕЎeДҮera
1 prstohvat soli
1 kesica (15 gr) praЕЎka za pecivo


900 gr zamrznutih viЕЎanja
malo manje od jedne ДҚaЕЎe ЕЎeДҮera
1 kaЕЎiДҚicu cimeta
pola ДҚaЕЎe ulja


Malo margarina ili putera ukoliko ne pravite posnu verziju.
#kolaДҚ #kolaДҚi #pita #sipanapita #recept

NaЕҫalost ne mogu da vam doДҚaram koliko je lepo mirisala kuhinja dok se pekao, jer je dovoljno samo da osetite miris i sve ДҮe vam biti jasno koliko je dobar i ukusan ovaj kolaДҚ. InaДҚe ovu pitu odnosno kolaДҚ moЕҫete praviti kao posnu ili mrsnu varijantu a razlika je jedino u tome da li ДҮete koristiti puter ili  margarin. es.title: La tarta mГЎs sencilla del mundo y ademГЎs deliciosa
es.description:
El pastel mГЎs simple del mundo que cualquiera puede hacer porque es demasiado simple y el sabor es divino. Lamentablemente, no puedo mostrarte lo bien que olГӯa la cocina mientras se horneaba, porque basta con olerlo y todo te quedarГЎ claro lo bueno y delicioso que es este pastel. De lo contrario, puede hacer este pastel o pastel como una variante magra o grasosa, y la Гәnica diferencia es si usarГЎ mantequilla o margarina. AdemГЎs de no ser caro, este bizcocho mГЎs sencillo del mundo te encantarГЎ por su sencillez y sabor.

INGREDIENTES
2 tazas de harina blanda Sentella tipo 400
2 tazas de sГ©mola

1 sobre (15 g) de levadura en polvo


900 g de cerezas congeladas
un poco menos de una taza de azГәcar
1 cucharadita de canela
media taza de aceite


Un poco de margarina o mantequilla

Sajnos nem tudom megmutatni, milyen kellemes illatГә volt a konyha sГјtГ©s kГ¶zben, mert elГ©g csak szagolni, Г©s minden vilГЎgos lesz szГЎmodra, milyen jГі Г©s finom ez a torta. EllenkezЕ‘ esetben elkГ©szГӯtheti ezt a pitГ©t vagy sГјtemГ©nyt sovГЎny vagy zsГӯros vГЎltozatkГ©nt, Г©s az egyetlen kГјlГ¶nbsГ©g az, hogy vajat vagy margarint hasznГЎl-e. Amellett, hogy nem drГЎga, ez a vilГЎg legegyszerЕұbb sГјtemГ©nye elvarГЎzsol egyszerЕұsГ©gГ©vel Г©s ГӯzГ©vel.

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвҖӢ #FutureNostalgiaвҖӢ #Grammys

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) вҖ“ our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вҖ“ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвҖҷs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11вҖҷs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXвҖҷs fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico вҖ” go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz вҖ” this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful вҖ” please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive вҖ” https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive вҖ” https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster вҖ” https://ve42.co/Broughton

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz вҖ” this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. snippet.title: Starlink Mission
snippet.description:
SpaceX is targeting Wednesday, April 7 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 12:34 p.m. EDT, or 16:34 UTC, and a backup opportunity is available on Thursday, April 8 at 12:12 p.m. EDT, or 16:12 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of NASA astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley to the International Space Station, ANASIS-II, CRS-21, Transporter-1, and two Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9вҖҷs first stage on the вҖңOf Course I Still Love YouвҖқ droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9вҖҷs fairing prevouisly supported launch of AMOS-17 and two Starlink missions, and the other previously supported a Starlink mission.

SpaceX is targeting Wednesday, April 7 for launch of 60 Starlink satellites from Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40) at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida. The instantaneous window is at 12:34 p.m. EDT, or 16:34 UTC, and a backup opportunity is available on Thursday, April 8 at 12:12 p.m. EDT, or 16:12 UTC.

The Falcon 9 first stage rocket booster supporting this mission previously supported launch of NASA astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley to the International Space Station, ANASIS-II, CRS-21, Transporter-1, and two Starlink missions. Following stage separation, SpaceX will land Falcon 9вҖҷs first stage on the вҖңOf Course I Still Love YouвҖқ droneship, which will be located in the Atlantic Ocean. One half of Falcon 9вҖҷs fairing prevouisly supported launch of AMOS-17 and two Starlink missions, and the other previously supported a Starlink mission.

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвҖӢ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

snippet.title: Е ta joЕЎ mogu da nam urade | Novi Sputnjik poredak
snippet.description:
вҖһNovi Sputnjik poredakвҖң otkriva kako razmiЕЎlja ЕЎef ruske diplomatije Sergej Lavrov.

ZaЕЎto s Amerikom viЕЎe nema ozbiljnog razgovora, a njena politika ipak nema ЕЎansi da uspe? Kako ministar inostranih poslova Ruske Federacije objaЕЎnjava Alijansino sve glasnije zveckanje oruЕҫjem i raketnim ЕЎtitovima dualne namene, i treba li zbog toga da se zabrinemo? Zbog ДҚega Kremlj ne veruje francuskom predsedniku Emanuelu Makronu?

O ovim pitanjima u emisiji вҖһNovi Sputnjik poredakвҖң razgovaraju Nikola VrziДҮ i njegovi gosti вҖ” dopisnik вҖһVeДҚernjih novostiвҖң iz Moskve Branko VlahoviДҮ i urednik u вҖһPoliticiвҖң Bojan Bilbija.

Za sve najvaЕҫnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naЕЎ sajt в–ә https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

ЕҪelite prvi da saznate vest, ne sumnjate u njenu taДҚnost i ispratite najbitnije dogaД‘aje u svetu koji utiДҚu i na naЕЎe Еҫivote? Interesuju vas miЕЎljenja najeminentnijih struДҚnjaka iz ЕЎirokog spektra oblasti i komentari na sve goruДҮe teme? PronaД‘ite to na Sputnjiku.

в–ҢGOVORIMO ONO Е TO DRUGI PREДҶUTKUJUв–җ

snippet.title: Why F1 Engines are Built with Sand
snippet.description:
Sand printing is similar to 3D printing; layers of 0.25mm thick sand are вҖҳprintedвҖҷ onto a jobbox with a layer of chemical binder in between allowing for complex 3D shapes to be made, slice by slice, layer by layer. It's so good that F1, LMP1, LMP2, WRC, WRX and Moto GP use this tech to make all sorts of parts. So how does it work and is it the way of the future?

New to the Channel?
